_meta.description: Persistent upgrade schedule. Owner: Opus (auto-updates on ship/revert). Read by opus_review.py for 08:00 AM / 08:00 PM packets. Read/update by operator at briefs.
_meta.schema: upgrades[]: {id, title, priority, status, approved_in_principle, gate, target_window, est_build_time, expected_protection_usd_per_week, exit_condition, files_touched, depends_on, notes, history[]}

upgrades.title: Loss-streak universe pause
upgrades.gate: 8 AM 2026-04-24 brief: clean overnight autonomy stack + operator green-light
upgrades.exit_condition: 7-day cumulative attribution HELPED==0 and HURT>=2 → revert trigger; L1 freeze on 2 HURT verdicts same param
upgrades.mechanism: 5 consec universe losses → sentinel_override: TARGET_DEPLOY_PCT=0.25 + MIN_SCORE_TO_TRADE=88 for 2h TTL; pair_status COOLDOWN on last losing pair 4h TTL

history.note: direct response to observed 10/10 losses on Kraken
Operator approved 8 AM 2026-04-24. Build starting with force_flatten-inclusive streak counter.
Code built + syntax OK + dry-run fires on live data (18-loss streak detected, -$22.56). Awaiting supervisor restart to go live.
18 consec losses found in live exit_counterfactuals.jsonl. Will fire on first post-restart sentinel cycle. Action: TARGET_DEPLOY_PCT=0.25, MIN_SCORE_TO_TRADE=88, NEAR/USD COOLDOWN 4h.

upgrades.title: BTC dominance gate for Kraken alts
upgrades.gate: B12 validated clean for 24h + operator green-light at 8 AM or 8 PM brief
upgrades.exit_condition: 7-day cumulative attribution HELPED==0 → revert; false-positive rate >50% (gate blocks entries that would have won) → reconsider threshold
upgrades.mechanism: If BTC 7d trend < 3% OR BTC 24h range < 1.5%, sentinel raises Kraken alt MIN_SCORE_TO_TRADE to 85 (6h TTL, refresh while condition persists). BTC/USD pair exempt.

upgrades.title: Post-regime-flip observation cooldown
upgrades.gate: B12 + BTC_DOM_GATE both validated clean + operator green-light
upgrades.exit_condition: 7-day cumulative attribution <0 → revert; cooldown blocks >2 successful entries per week → tighten condition
upgrades.mechanism: On regime change, governor forces SCOUT mode with entry_allowed=false for 1h regardless of flip direction. Kernel HALT overrides (can't block flatten).

upgrades.title: Skip _meta key in pair_status reader (cosmetic)
upgrades.gate: Trivial 2-line fix during next maintenance window. Operator ack at 8 AM brief.
upgrades.mechanism: In _apply_pair_status: if pair.startswith('_'): continue. Skips _meta log noise.

history.note: _meta key rendered as active_entry in log post-restart, non-functional

upgrades.title: Fix opus_review.py open-issue counter + parser
upgrades.gate: Trivial parser fix. Non-blocking. Operator ack at 8 AM.
upgrades.mechanism: Filter issues.jsonl by open state (not closed) + parse early-format records cleanly. Eliminates '[?] ?' rows.

history.note: 19:50 packet showed 21 open issues with many '[?] ?' unparsed rows

upgrades.title: Shadow baseline counterfactual
upgrades.mechanism: Run shadow param set (operator baseline) against same market ticks. Weekly compare live-vs-shadow PnL. If shadow beats live trailing-7d → auto-revert to baseline + operator flag.

upgrades.title: Calibration tracker (metacognition)
upgrades.gate: 30 days of verdict data. Start collecting now; build later.
upgrades.mechanism: Compare expected_impact_usd (pre-write) vs realized 6h delta. If 30d calibration <55% correct direction → halve adjustment magnitudes autonomously.

upgrades.title: Alpaca lunch-hour entry block
upgrades.gate: Alpaca shows mid-day loss evidence (currently 5/5 clean — no signal)

history.note: Alpaca 5/5 wins; no chop loss evidence yet

upgrades.title: Weekend Kraken posture gate
upgrades.gate: Weekend PnL data shows worse edge than weekdays
upgrades.mechanism: Force SCOUT Fri 17:00 ET → Sun 18:00 ET unless BTC 24h range > 1.5%.

upgrades.title: Pair-level universe pruning (autonomous DISABLED_SOFT)
upgrades.gate: 4+ weeks of per-pair PnL attribution data
upgrades.mechanism: Pair < 35% win rate over last 20 trades → auto-DISABLED_SOFT 7d. Operator veto at brief.
